analysis.reasoning: Core message: The author is coordinating with EU leaders on COVID-19, urging patience, discipline, and solidarity, and asserting that the EU is working hard on all aspects of the crisis. Evaluation by narrative: EU1 (successful story) – not directly; no historical framing or emphasis on long-term success. EU2 (EU is united) – partially supported: mentions discussing with EU leaders and calls for solidarity, implying coordinated, unified action. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – supported: stresses that the EU is working hard on all aspects of the crisis, showing a practical, proactive response to citizens’ concerns. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – not applicable; no pioneering policy or leadership claim. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not addressed. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – not addressed; focus is internal EU crisis management. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU2 and EU3.
